function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0005
alias: northstar_followup_pack
issued_on: 2026-03-26
total_eur: 420
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 180
    line_eur: 180
---
# Northstar follow-up pack invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0005                      |
| alias          | northstar_followup_pack       |
| issued_on      | 2026-03-26                    |
| total_eur      | 420                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
| 2 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 180      | 180      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 420      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Later invoice after a narrower product pass, still uncomfortably close to consulting if Miles is honest.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by OCR-structuring the requested invoice note. Added YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_26__eur_000420__inv_0005__northstar_followup_pack.md using the finance invoice schema, preserved the original note body verbatim below the frontmatter, and kept the change focused. Then removed the processed inbox item 00_inbox/000_next-task.md.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read relevant 99_system workflows/schemas before task work, respected nested AGENTS in inbox and finance lanes, preserved original body during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion per inbox-processing-v2-update.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request explicitly asked to OCR-structure one invoice file. The target file contained all required invoice fields and line items visible in the body, enabling schema-compliant frontmatter extraction without guessing. The file was updated in place with preserved body text, and the inbox request file was deleted after success.
